Key changes include: * Correcting syntax and TypeScript errors in `clean-build/pages/_app.tsx`. * Refactoring `app/components/PerformanceMonitor.tsx` to improve type definitions, adjust logging, and move the `reportWebVitals` helper function. * Removing unused code and an `axios` example from `api-documentation.tsx`. * Updating `package-lock.json` to reflect dependency changes. ## Type of Change - [x] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue) - [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality) - [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected) - [ ] Documentation update - [x] Refactoring (no functional changes) - [ ] Performance improvement - [ ] Security fix ## Testing - [x] I have tested this change locally - [ ] I have added tests for this change - [x] All existing tests pass - [x] I have tested the build process ## Checklist - [x] My code follows the project's style guidelines - [x] I have performed a self-review of my code - [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas - [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation - [x] My changes generate no new warnings - [x] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes - [ ] Any dependent changes have been merged and published ## Screenshots (if applicable) N/A ## Additional Notes The changes were made to resolve various TypeScript compilation errors and improve code maintainability. ---
